evals.prompt:
I want to apply for a CISO role. Here's a job description:

Chief Information Security Officer (CISO)
We're looking for an experienced security leader to own our entire security program. You'll report to the CTO and be responsible for:
- Building and leading a security organization (20+ engineers)
- Enterprise risk management and compliance (SOC2, ISO 27001, FedRAMP)
- Application security, cloud security, and infrastructure security
- Incident response and threat intelligence
- Security strategy and roadmap aligned with business objectives
- Board-level communication of security posture and risk

Requirements: 12+ years in security, 5+ years in leadership, experience with cloud-native environments (AWS/GCP/Azure), strong track record of building security programs from the ground up.

Please take my resume and tailor it for this role. My resume is at: /sessions/user-session/mnt/Resume/Candidate -Engineering Manager - Security & AI_Extensive Version.docx
evals.expected_output: A polished .docx resume tailored to a CISO role, emphasizing leadership, program-building, and strategic security experience. Should preserve all real experience and dates.

evals.prompt:
I need to update my resume for an AI/ML Security Engineering Manager position. Here's the job posting:

Engineering Manager, AI/ML Security
Join our team building security for AI/ML systems. You will:
- Lead a team of 8-12 security engineers focused on AI/ML pipeline security
- Design and implement security controls for ML model training and inference
- Develop threat models for LLM-based applications
- Build automated security testing for ML pipelines
- Partner with ML engineers to embed security into the ML lifecycle

Requirements: 8+ years in security engineering, 3+ years managing teams, hands-on experience with Python, cloud platforms, and ML frameworks. Experience with LLM security, prompt injection, and model safety is a strong plus.

My resume: /sessions/user-session/mnt/Resume/Candidate -Engineering Manager - Security & AI_Extensive Version.docx

Also check my interview prep notes for additional context about my experience: /sessions/user-session/mnt/Resume/Interview/
evals.expected_output: A .docx resume tailored for AI/ML security management. Should pull relevant details from interview prep documents to enrich bullet points. Should emphasize AI/ML experience and team leadership.

evals.prompt: Can you make my resume look more professional and modern? I don't have a specific job in mind right now, just want it polished and ready. Resume is here: /sessions/user-session/mnt/Resume/Candidate -Engineering Manager - Security & AI_Concise.docx
evals.expected_output: A clean, modern .docx resume with improved formatting and language, but without specific job tailoring. Should ask the user about their target role type before proceeding.

evals.prompt:
I'm applying for a Director of Security Engineering role at a major tech company. Here's the JD:

Director, Security Engineering
- Own the security engineering function across application security, cloud security, and detection & response
- Build and scale a team of 25+ engineers across multiple sub-teams
- Drive security architecture decisions for a large-scale SaaS platform
- Establish metrics and reporting for security program effectiveness
- Collaborate with engineering, product, and legal/compliance teams
- Manage a $5M+ annual security tooling budget

Requirements: 15+ years in security, 7+ years in senior leadership, proven track record of scaling security organizations, deep technical background with hands-on experience.

My resume is: /sessions/user-session/mnt/Resume/Candidate -Engineering Manager - Security & AI_Extensive Version.docx

I also have some experience documents that go deeper into my achievements:
- /sessions/user-session/mnt/Resume/Interview/Interview Prep/Career progression.txt
- /sessions/user-session/mnt/Resume/Interview/Interview Prep/Cross Functional collaboration.txt
- /sessions/user-session/mnt/Resume/Interview/ir-manager-interview-responses.md

Please use these to make my bullet points more impactful with real details from my experience.
evals.expected_output: A .docx resume tailored for Director-level role, heavily enriched with details from the experience documents. Should demonstrate the user's leadership scale, cross-functional impact, and program-building achievements using specific metrics and stories from the supplementary files.
